_comment: TEMPLATE — this file is overwritten by `npm run deploy:sepolia` after the user configures the Hardhat keystore (SEPOLIA_RPC_URL, SEPOLIA_PRIVATE_KEY) and runs the live Sepolia deployment. Until then this file documents the schema and the canonical Sepolia infrastructure addresses. See `docs/deployment_runbook.md` and `KEYSTORE.md` for the full procedure.
deployer: <populated by deploy:sepolia — Sepolia EOA from SEPOLIA_PRIVATE_KEY>
stable: <populated by deploy:sepolia — either 0x1c7D4B196Cb0C7B01d743Fbc6116a902379C7238 (Circle USDC Sepolia) or freshly-deployed MockStable address>
vestingWallets: <populated by deploy:sepolia — N OZ VestingWallet addresses, one per recipient>
hookSalt: <populated by deploy:sepolia — mined for this deployer/factory>

e2e._comment: Populated by `npm run e2e:sepolia` after the live deployment. The dry-run analog lives in deploy/sepolia/dry_run_manifest.json.
